title: Durabaculum bandaense
taxonomy: Durabaculum bandaense is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It is native to Western Ghats mountain range in India. The classification of Durabaculum bandaense places it within the genus Durabaculum. Durabaculum bandaense is a rare and endemic species. More research is needed to confirm its classification and understand its unique characteristics.
uses: Durabaculum bandaense, a species of flowering plant, has been found to have potential medicinal uses. It is reported to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
